name: @stargazempp/vault-circuits
description: Groth16 circuits + on-chain verifiers for StargazeVault privacy tiers.

scripts.verifier:aggregate: snarkjs zkey export solidityverifier build/aggregate_sum_final.zkey build/AggregateSumVerifier.sol
scripts.all:aggregate-dev: npm run compile:aggregate && npm run setup:aggregate-dev && npm run verifier:aggregate
